title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: Oil price predicted to remain above $100 for rest of year
snippet: Investment bank JP Morgan expects oil to remain in the "low $100s" even if the Strait of Hormuz were to reopen next month.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
snippet: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
snippet: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook among CEOs expected to accompany Trump on China trip
snippet: A total of 17 US executives are set to join the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.

title: What is hantavirus and how does it spread?
snippet: The Andes strain of the virus, which can rarely be passed from person to person,  has been found among passengers of a cruise ship.

title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
snippet: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
snippet: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
snippet: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
snippet: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.

title: Last passengers leave virus-hit cruise ship as three more test positive
snippet: An American and a French national who have returned home have tested positive for hantavirus.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
snippet: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

title: US passengers quarantining in Nebraska as officials say public hantavirus risk 'very low'
snippet: Two people are being monitored in Atlanta, while 16 others are in Nebraska at the nation's only national quarantine unit.

title: Watch: Alaska town sees its last sunset until August
snippet: Residents of Utqiagvik, the United States' northernmost city, will experience 84 days of midnight sun and uninterrupted daylight.
